description_long: This desk features a modern, angular design with a flat, rectangular top surface supported by two wide, V-shaped legs on either side. The legs are constructed from a dark material and are angled outward, giving the desk a striking geometric appearance. A single, broad shelf is suspended beneath the main tabletop, providing additional storage or workspace. The shelf is set back from the front edge, creating an open area for legroom. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The color palette consists of a combination of dark brown or black for the legs and a lighter gray for the top and shelf.
description: A modern desk with a flat gray top, angular dark legs, and a recessed shelf beneath the main surface. The design is geometric and minimalist, with ample legroom and storage space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, angular legs and the open space beneath the desk, with the shelf visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the V-shaped profile of the legs and the depth of the shelf beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the shelf is more prominent and the open legroom area is less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the V-shaped legs and the shelf's position relative to the tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the open legroom and recessed shelf, while the angled legs mark the sides and the shelf is set toward the back.
